policy_summary: Command EVE may act as the founder-facing AionUI/Hermes Chief-of-Staff layer, but native AionUI/Hermes autonomy remains disabled or gated until Company.OS CEO/CAO/HumanGate evidence promotes it.

allowed_actions: show Command EVE as the default founder-facing shell
send chat messages to the configured Hermes runtime
upload local files only for user-selected chat context
open local project folders selected by the user
show proposal cards and read-only evidence

disabled_features.name: AionUI Scheduled Tasks / Cron
disabled_features.reason: Company.OS scheduler, hard-cron wrapper and controller gates are the only released recurring execution path.

disabled_features.name: AionUI Team Mode
disabled_features.reason: Team/agent collaboration must be modeled as Plane parent/child contracts first.

disabled_features.name: Visible assistant/runtime switching
disabled_features.reason: 0.7.3 presents EVE over Hermes as the default shell; other runtimes remain backend routes, not founder-facing choices.

disabled_features.name: YOLO / full-auto permission mode
disabled_features.reason: EVE is proposal-only until CEO/Codex and CAO promote a bounded lane.

disabled_features.name: Direct Plane writes from AionUI
disabled_features.reason: Plane writes route through Company.OS controller/scheduler paths, not the UI shell.

allowed_actions: load SOUL.md and runtime boot packet
draft Plane worker contracts with dispatch: manual

disabled_features.name: Hermes native cronjob execution
disabled_features.reason: Recurring execution must use Company.OS hard-cron/scheduler gates.

disabled_features.name: Hermes direct task delegation/spawn
disabled_features.reason: Worker dispatch requires CEO/Codex review, Stage 0.5/0.65 and Plane contracts.

disabled_features.name: Hermes direct kanban mutation
disabled_features.reason: Execution ledger writes require Plane-first controller authority.

disabled_features.name: Broad native toolset activation
disabled_features.reason: Tool capabilities must be scoped through Company.OS connector manifests and CapabilityProfiles.

gated_features.name: Honcho durable memory writes
gated_features.reason: Memory writes are proposal-only until the correct Honcho workspace, peer and persistence boundary are confirmed.

gated_features.name: Hermes default model/provider change
gated_features.reason: Runtime auth/model changes affect client cost, privacy and reliability.

blocked_actions: no deploy, publish, send, schedule or spend
no native AionUI/Hermes cron or team autonomy
no raw secrets, cookies, browser storage or private raw memory
no durable Honcho memory writes before HG-2 setup
promotion_rule: A disabled or gated native feature may move only through a Plane child contract, CAO/controller review, evidence report and the declared HumanGate. Configuration alone is not promotion evidence.
